builder_validation.result: BuilderSanity.test.goal passes in this v4 run via `plang --test` — builder validated end-to-end.

summary: v4 PASS. C# 3036/3036 and PLang 208/208 both green; zero `FAIL: ` headers, zero `[Fail]` lines. Coder commit 9af7fd8b2 (suppress nested test.report console output) resolved the v3 false-positive — my [Fail]-line grep was counting test.report's own rendering of intentional-failure fixtures it consumes as data, not actual top-level test failures. Lesson saved to tester memory.
